description: Full reproducible MAE citation-review example using OpenAI API, generated regexes, open PDFs, extracted full text, and chunked review writing.

fallbacks_when_unspecified.fetch.max_results: null means fetch all citing papers returned by OpenAlex
fallbacks_when_unspecified.pdfs.max_pdfs: null means attempt all open PDF URLs
fallbacks_when_unspecified.extract_text.max_pdfs: null means extract all downloaded/skipped PDFs
fallbacks_when_unspecified.review_prompt.yes_only: true means final review evidence includes confirmed yes papers only
fallbacks_when_unspecified.review_prompt.abstract_chars: all means include full abstracts for selected papers
fallbacks_when_unspecified.review_prompt.full_text_chars: all means include full extracted text for selected papers
fallbacks_when_unspecified.llm_review.mode: chunked is the safer default for full-text prompts
fallbacks_when_unspecified.llm_review.max_output_tokens: 4096 keeps output bounded; chunk_chars controls full-text input per chunk
